reference_scope: aMule LowID, server callback, Kad firewalled, buddy behavior
acceptance: Current LowID, callback, and firewalled behaviors are documented against aMule.

acceptance: Callback requested, accepted, failed, timed out, impossible, and completed states are represented without ambiguous booleans.

reference_scope: aMule DS_LOWTOLOWIP and firewalled source behavior
acceptance: Unreachable LowID sources do not consume normal direct-connect scheduling and expire predictably.
notes: LowID sources require accepted callback state before direct scheduling.

acceptance: Kad buddy and direct callback are implemented only if architecture and evidence justify them; otherwise limitations are documented with impact.

notes: No false capability claims; public firewall limitations remain operational behavior.
